action_set_definitions.name: get_order_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves information for a specific order, including required items and destination.

action_set_definitions.name: get_sop_requirements
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the protocol for a specific SOP code to identify temperature constraints and required materials.

action_set_definitions.name: get_inventory_by_zone
action_set_definitions.description: Searches for specific SKUs within a designated warehouse zone to retrieve their Bin IDs and stock levels.

sku_list.description: List of target SKUs to find (e.g., ['VIP-COOLER-MD', 'DATA-LOGGER-DIGITAL']).

action_set_definitions.name: locate_sku_storage
action_set_definitions.description: Returns the specific storage location (Bin ID) and environment type for a particular SKU.

action_set_definitions.name: get_facility_node
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the Node ID for specific warehouse functional locations such as docks.

action_set_definitions.name: find_available_robot
action_set_definitions.description: Identifies an idle AMR (Autonomous Mobile Robot) suitable for handling the task.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_robot_move
action_set_definitions.description: Dispatches a robot to a specific Bin ID or Node ID.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_robot_pick
action_set_definitions.description: Commands a robot to pick an item from a bin. Picking temperature-controlled items triggers the custody clock.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_pack_and_stage
action_set_definitions.description: Finalizes the order by applying specified packaging materials and staging the payload at the designated dock. This action stops the Cold Chain clock.

packaging_skus.description: List of all packaging/monitoring SKUs used.

state_description.inventory: A map where keys are Bin IDs and values are objects containing SKU IDs and their current quantities.
state_description.orders: A map of Order IDs to their current details, including items requested and status (e.g., 'pending', 'picking', 'packed', 'shipped').
state_description.robots: Current status and location of autonomous mobile robots (AMRs) in the warehouse.
state_description.warehouse_map: Connectivity graph of locations within the warehouse to validate movement actions.
